Du tar initiativ, är engagerad och tar ansvar för att målen nås. Du bidrar till verksamhetens utveckling och hjälper dina kollegor att lyckas. Du bemöter andra med respekt, vänlighet och lyssnar aktivt på andra och visar positiv attityd.


Du är samarbetsorienterad och bygger förtroende och skapar goda relationer med utvecklingsteam, arkitekter och andra intressenter. Du är även pedagogisk och kommunikativ och kan omsätta tekniskt komplexa frågor till praktiska arbetssätt och stötta team i deras utveckling. Du är drivande och initiativtagande och du identifierar förbättringsmöjligheter och tar ansvar för att omsätta idéer till resultat. Du är även strukturerad och kvalitetsmedveten och arbetar metodiskt och har fokus på hållbara lösningar, automation och ständiga förbättringar.

**Dina kvalifikationer****:**
-----------------------------


Vi söker dig som har:

* minst 3–5 års aktuell arbetslivserfarenhet inom DevOps, CI/CD eller mjukvaruleveranser
* dokumenterad erfarenhet av att bygga, utveckla eller förvalta CI/CD-pipelines i komplexa systemmiljöer
* erfarenhet av Git-baserad versionshantering
* erfarenhet av Jenkins, eller motsvarande CI/CD-verktyg
* erfarenhet av OpenShift och Kubernetes. Erfarenhet av Linux-baserade miljöer
* erfarenhet av artefakthantering med exempelvis Artifactory eller motsvarande
* erfarenhet av kodkvalitetsverktyg såsom SonarQube eller motsvarande
* god förståelse för DevSecOps-principer och hur kvalitet, säkerhet och testning integreras i leveransflöden
* erfarenhet av automatisering och scriptutveckling
* förmåga att uttrycka sig väl i tal och skrift på svenska och engelska
* gymnasieutbildning eller annan utbildning/erfarenhet som arbetsgivaren bedömer likvärdig


Det är önskvärt att du har aktuell erfarenhet av:

* Azure DevOps. Erfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code, exempelvis Terraform eller Ansible
* GitOps-arbetssätt och verktyg som ArgoCD
* moderna testautomationsverktyg såsom Cypress, Playwright, Pact eller k6
* containerisering och Docker
* observability-plattformar, exempelvis Prometheus, Grafana, ELK/OpenSearch eller motsvarande
* säkerhetskontroller i CI/CD-flöden, exempelvis SAST, DAST, SCA eller container scanning
* Java-baserade system och byggverktyg som Maven
* erfarenhet av att coacha eller stötta utvecklingsteam i förändringsarbete
* erfarenhet av arbete i större organisationer med flera utvecklingsteam
* agila arbetssätt såsom Scrum eller Kanban

**Om oss**
----------


Kronofogden är en statlig myndighet med ett viktigt uppdrag. Vi jobbar nära människor i utsatta situationer. Vi hjälper den som inte har fått betalt och vägleder den som ska betala. Vi ger medborgare och företag information och god service, så att de kan fatta långsiktiga och hållbara beslut. Det kräver kunskap, handlingskraft, omtanke och mod. Vi bidrar till ett väl fungerande samhälle för allmänhet och företag – ett samhälle där skulder och andra krav blir fastställda och indrivna på ett rättssäkert sätt.


Hos oss kan du räkna med utmanande arbetsuppgifter som även är utvecklande för dig. När du går hem från en dag på jobbet kan du vara säker på att du har gjort något som verkligen räknas – både för andra och för dig.

**Bra att veta**
----------------


Anställningen är tillsvidare och inleds med provanställning i sex månader. Du blir anställd som IT-handläggare. Kronofogden erbjuder möjlighet till distansarbete efter överenskommelse med arbetsgivaren.


Att arbeta i staten innebär att du följer den statliga värdegrunden. Det ställs också särskilda krav på omdöme, säkerhetstänkande och att du följer gällande lagar. Vi ställer frågor vid intervju om tidigare eventuell brottslighet och brister i tidigare anställning. För slutkandidater ställs även dessa frågor till referenspersoner. Vi tar även in uppgifter om skulder registrerade hos Kronofogden, konkurs och näringsförbud. Framkomna uppgifter vägs in vid helhetsbedömningen av din lämplighet för den aktuella anställningen.


En anställning hos oss kan innebära placering i säkerhetsklass. En säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) kan därför komma att genomföras före beslut om anställning. För en del av våra arbetsuppgifter i säkerhetsklass krävs svenskt medborgarskap.


När du ansöker bifogar du ditt cv. Vi använder inte personligt brev i våra rekryteringar och du ska därför inte bifoga det i din ansökan.


Lär känna oss bättre genom att besöka vår webbplats och följa oss på Linkedin.


Kronofogden.se: Jobba hos oss


Kronofogden på Linkedin


Välkommen med din ansökan senast 2026-08-31!


Vi samarbetar med Skatteverket i våra rekryteringar, vilket innebär att Skatteverkets hr-avdelning kommer att hantera din ansökan. Kronofogden använder det statliga ramavtalet för annonsförmedling. Vi undanber oss därför vänligen samtal från annonsförmedlare eller försäljare.


Anställningsform: tillsvidareanställning | Anställningens omfattning: heltid | Antal lediga befattningar: 2 | Sysselsättningsgrad: 100% | Ort: Ospecificerad arbetsort | Län: Ospecificerad arbetsort | Land: Sweden | Referensnummer: 2026/150 | Kontakt: Stephan Quist Karlsson 010-5792692, Susanna Jareno 010-5743143, | Facklig företrädare: Henrik Jonés, SACO 010-5792535, Lars Dahlin, ST 010-5776407, | Publicerat: 2026-07-01 | Sista ansökningsdag: 2026-09-04

title: Site Reliability & DevOps Engineer
description:
Our games run on infrastructure that has to work - at scale, under pressure, with real players on the other end. If you're the kind of engineer who gets quietly annoyed when something could be more reliable, more automated, or more elegant, and then actually goes and fixes it, this might be the right role for you.


About the role


You'll be a key part of building and maintaining the cloud infrastructure that powers our games. Working closely with our client and backend developers, you'll make sure our services are scalable, secure, and running smoothly - so our game teams can focus on making great games rather than fighting fires.


This is a hands-on role. You'll design and own infrastructure, build CI/CD pipelines, develop microservices, and drive automation across the stack. You'll also work directly with game teams to support releases and live operations - which means you'll need to be comfortable operating across disciplines, not just inside a silo.


What you'll be doing

* Design, implement, and maintain infrastructure for our backend services and tools
* Deploy and monitor backend services, managing performance and minimising downtime
* Develop and maintain scalable microservices to support game functionality and growth
* Build, implement, and optimise CI/CD pipelines for reliable software delivery
* Drive automation across infrastructure to increase speed and reduce manual work
* Support game teams with tooling and documentation for releases and live operations


What we need from you

* Proven hands-on experience as an SRE or DevOps engineer – you will be taking over from our sole responsible and leading the space in the studio.
* Strong infrastructure and networking knowledge: DNS, VPCs, firewalls, VPNs, load balancers, certificate management, and Kubernetes ingress
* IAM and security experience: OAUTH, SAML, and federated identity management in GCP and AWS
* Hands-on experience with: Terraform, GKE/EKS, Packer, Git, ArgoCD, Grafana, GCP Monitoring, BigQuery
* Experience with CI/CD and development tools: GitHub Actions, Slack, Unity SCM or similar


Useful but not required

* Strong scripting or programming background - C#, Rust, Python or similar
* Experience in game development or the games industry
* Familiarity with the specific requirements of AR and VR games
* Experience driving security initiatives
* Willingness to pick up new tools: Rust, PowerShell, Agones/Open-Match


Who you are


You are proactive and collaborative - you spot problems before they become incidents and you build solutions that others can use, not just workarounds that only make sense to you. You work well with cross-functional teams and you are comfortable explaining technical decisions to people who are not engineers. You care about doing things properly but you also know when good enough is the right answer.


Who we are


Resolution Games is a Stockholm-based games studio with a proven track record creating immersive gaming experiences. We got our start in VR and AR and still believe spatial gaming is where the most interesting things are happening - but our work now spans PC, console, and beyond. As players and developers, we have spent years putting our energy into making the most of new platforms: creating positive first experiences for someone stepping into XR for the first time, and building deep, replayable games that keep enthusiasts coming back for more.


We are looking for someone who wants a unique opportunity and enjoys collaborating. Someone who wants to be part of a team raising the bar and creating a new set of standards. Our colleagues have can-do attitudes and appreciate a small studio culture. Even though we have grown, we continue to work in small teams, experiment, and tackle complex challenges. We value having every voice heard and seek out diversity, equity, and inclusion in everything we do. We believe in team over the individual, a great mix of freedom with responsibility, and that people should always come before the process. P.S. Employee stock options are available.


How we work


We are an office-first studio. We think being in the same room makes the work better and the team stronger - and honestly, it shows in what we build. We are flexible on start and finish times, and the occasional work-from-home day is part of life.


Sound like you?


We will start looking at applicants on a rolling basis from early August, so if you are interested, apply now and we will be in touch then.


/ Team Resolution Games

title: Testare till Inhouse projekt
description:
Vi på MyTeam söker nu efter en testare/ testledare till vårt inhouse team i Örebro. Är du redo för nya utmaningar och ser ett stark hopsvetsat team och nya spännande uppdrag som en del av din framtid, tveka inte att söka!

**Bakgrund**


På MyTeam har vi två centrala målsättningar; att leverera stabila lösningar som genererar nöjda kunder och att skapa trygga team med lyckliga medarbetare. Tack vare lång erfarenhet av att arbeta med systemförvaltning är de processer vi använder väl beprövade och framgångsrika, och underlättar för oss att göra lyckade kundanpassningar efter krav och önskemål.

**Hur ser rollen ut?**


Hos oss planerar du testarbetet och skriver testplaner, prioriterar, resurssäkrar testuppdraget samt följer upp och förbättrar testprocessen. Dessutom koordinerar du testarbetet samt sköter teamuppföljning.


Med dina kollegor på Nexer delar du kunskap och tillsammans bygger vi kompetens och tar oss an de stora utmaningarna. Att bygga och dela kompetens är viktigt för oss. Att gå kurser och ta certifieringar välkomnas alltid.

**Din bakgrund**


Du har arbetat några år med testautomatisering i större och mindre testprojekt. Vi tror att du har stor vana av agila tillvägagångssätt, till exempel Scrum och SAFe samt DevOps. Du är mycket bekväm med följande verktyg:

* Postman
* Playwright


Troligen är du utbildad systemvetare, ingenjör eller liknande. Det är meriterande om du har programmeringserfarenhet, t ex i JavaScript, Java och/eller C#


Dina personliga egenskaper är viktiga för oss då vill behålla den atmosfär vi har idag. Våra medarbetare kännetecknas av en affärsmässig och kundorienterad attityd, samt förmåga att snabbt ta till sig ny information och omvandla den till kreativa lösningar. Du respekterar dina kollegor och har en stark vilja att dela med dig av dina kunskaper till andra samt lyssna och lära.


Vi letar efter personer som säger VI och inte JAG.


Sist men inte minst, vi vill att du skall fortsätta att utvecklas och ha kul på jobbet!

###### **Ansökan**


Du ansöker genom att fylla i ansökningsformuläret nedan. Tyvärr kan vi inte ta emot ansökningar via e-post. Har du några frågor är du välkommen att kontakta vår rekryterare, Natalie Svensson, på Natalie.Svensson@nexergroup.com.


#LI-NS1

title: Senior SAP S/4HANA-konsult
description:
Vi söker flera erfarna SAP-konsulter som vill vara med och driva några av Nordens mest omfattande SAP S/4HANA-transformationer inom energi- och industrisektorn.


Vi söker personer med erfarenhet inom ett eller flera av följande områden:

* SAP EAM / Plant Maintenance (PM)
* SAP CRM och Customer Engagement
* SAP Document Management (DMS)
* SAP S/4HANA Migration
* SAP Utilities / IS-U
* Integrationslösningar och systemlandskap kring SAP


I dessa uppdrag kommer du att arbeta nära verksamhet, projektledning, utvecklingsteam och externa leverantörer för att analysera verksamhetsbehov, ta fram lösningsdesign, konfigurera system, stötta migreringar samt säkerställa framgångsrika tester och produktionssättningar.

**Arbetsuppgifter:**


Beroende på uppdrag kan du komma att:

* Ansvara för analys, design och implementation av SAP S/4HANA-lösningar
* Samla in och konkretisera verksamhetskrav samt ta fram funktionella specifikationer
* Genomföra konfiguration inom exempelvis EAM/PM, CRM, DMS eller Utilities
* Delta i eller leda migrerings-, test- och go-live-aktiviteter
* Utföra fit-gap-analyser och rekommendera lösningar enligt SAP:s best practice
* Säkerställa integrationer mellan SAP och kringliggande system
* Ta fram dokumentation, blueprints och processbeskrivningar
* Stötta verksamhet och nyckelanvändare genom utbildning och workshops
* Samarbeta med utvecklare, arkitekter, projektledare och andra funktionella team

**Kompetenskrav:**

* Minst 5–10 års erfarenhet av SAP som funktionell konsult eller specialist
* Erfarenhet av SAP S/4HANA-implementationer eller transformationsprojekt
* Djup kompetens inom något av områdena PM/EAM, CRM, DMS eller Utilities
* Erfarenhet av kravhantering, lösningsdesign och konfiguration
* God förståelse för integrationer mellan SAP-moduler och externa system
* Erfarenhet av testledning, migrering, cutover eller go-live-aktiviteter
* God förmåga att kommunicera med såväl verksamhet som tekniska team
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift

**Meriterande:**

* SAP IS-U och Utilities-erfarenhet
* SAP Fiori
* SAP BTP Integration Suite
* OData, IDoc och andra integrationsramverk
* SAP ECTR, SAP PLM Cloud eller Doxis4
* Microsoft Azure DevOps
* ABAP, CDS eller RAP
* Erfarenhet från energi-, kärnkrafts- eller annan tillgångsintensiv verksamhet

**Vem är du?**


Du är en analytisk och lösningsorienterad person som trivs i komplexa verksamhetsmiljöer. Du har lätt för att samarbeta med olika intressenter, kan omsätta affärsbehov till fungerande SAP-lösningar och bidrar gärna med din erfarenhet till både kollegor och kunder.

 **Humanit**


Humanit handlar om att göra saker lite annorlunda, att på riktigt sätta våra anställda i fokus. Vi växer tillsammans och värdesätter engagemang och ambition. För oss är det viktigt att du får chansen att vara med och påverka vägen framåt.


I utbyte erbjuder vi kompetens- och karriärutveckling genom varierande och utmanande uppdrag. Vi är inte branschinriktade och kan därför erbjuda en fantastisk variation bland uppdragen för dig som konsult. Självklart ser vi till att du får rätt utbildning och vi är väl medvetna om att det är det livslånga lärandet som bygger vår framgång.


Tillsammans skapar vi framtiden  

  



* Tillsvidareanställning med fast månadslön
* Kollektivavtal
* Vi tillämpar sex månaders provanställning, inklusive maxat friskvårdsbidrag
* Utvecklingsplan
* Hälsoförsäkring + pension
* Förskottssemester

 **Start**: Omgående med hänsyn till uppsägningstid och när säkerhetskontroll är genomförd. Uppdraget är på heltid och är tillsvidare.

**Plats**: Stockholm

**Ansökan**: Vi rekryterar löpande. Så skicka in din ansökan redan idag!

***Sveriges 7:e bästa arbetsplats 2026!***  

*Humanit arbetar tillsammans med Great Place To Work för att vi skall bli Sveriges bästa arbetsplats.*

**Och förresten:**

*Som en aktiv del i ett samhälle med kulturell och social mångfald är Humanit’s ambition att präglas av inkludering och bred representation, samt vara en arbetsplats med lika möjligheter för alla. Humanit anställer, bibehåller, befordrar och i övrigt behandlar alla medarbetare och kandidater efter erfarenhet, kvalifikationer och kompetens, oavsett kön, religion, ursprung, ålder, sexuell läggning, könsidentitet eller funktionsvariationer.*

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
*Kreditz is transforming how businesses assess credit and risk using real-time data and NextGen Credit Scoring solutions.*
*As one of Europe’s fastest-growing FinTech scaleups - we’ve earned a place on the* 
***Sifted 100: Nordics & Benelux***
*list in both 2024 and 2025 and most recently, we were proud to receive a* 
***double win at the Credit Management & Compliance Awards 2025***
*, being named both "* 
***Fintech Rocket of the Year***
*" and "* 
***Breakthrough of the Year***
*".*
*With strong growth across the Nordics and Europe, our clients range from leading banks and iGaming giants to fast-moving digital innovators.*
**About The Position**
 Kreditz is looking for a
 **DevOps Engineer** 
 to join our Tech team. In this role, you will build and evolve our cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and platform tooling, ensuring our systems are scalable, reliable, and secure as we grow.
   

  

 This is a hands-on builder role for someone who enjoys automation, ownership, and turning complexity into clean, scalable infrastructure.
   

  

**What Can Kreditz Offer**
* A once-in-a-lifetime growth journey, from startup to Global scaleup
* A journey where everyone in the team plays a crucial role for our company’s success
* Fun-loving, driven, and passionate colleagues who support each other’s success
* A culture that celebrates progress, humility, and teamwork
* We win together
* 24/7 access to gym, sauna and sports facilities at our office, plus additional wellness allowance
* Competitive base salary


**RESPONSIBILITES**
**Some Of The Main Responsibilities You Will Cover**
* Design, build, and maintain cloud infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).
* Develop and optimize CI/CD pipelines for automated testing and deployment.
* Build and deploy services on AWS using ECS, Fargate, and Service Connect.
* Implement and maintain monitoring, alerting, and observability solutions.
* Collaborate with developers to improve deployment workflows and platform reliability.
* Work with serverless technologies (Lambda) for event processing and automation.
* Perform code reviews and contribute hands-on to infrastructure projects.
* Leverage AI agents and tools to enhance development workflows and productivity.
* Document infrastructure architecture, processes, and runbooks.


 Success means engineers ship confidently, systems scale without drama, and incidents are rare, visible, and quickly resolved.
   

  

**WE ARE LOOKING FOR**
**We Believe That You Have**
* A Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field (or equivalent experience).
* 5+ years of experience in DevOps, platform engineering, or backend development.
* Strong skills in Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).
* Experience with AWS services, particularly ECS, Fargate, and Service Connect.
* Experience with CI/CD tools and pipeline automation.
* Familiarity with containerization (Docker/Podman).
* Familiarity with message queuing (SQS, SNS).
* Experience with databases like PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, DynamoDB.
* Strong skills in monitoring and observability tools (CloudWatch, OpenTelemetry, X-Ray).
* Proficiency with Git and version control workflows.
* Scripting skills in Python, Bash, or Go.
* Excellent English communication skills (Swedish is a plus).
* Enthusiasm for using AI agents and tools in daily development work.
* Experience in FinTech is a plus.


**WHY JOIN NOW?**
 At Kreditz, you'll have the opportunity to work in a cutting-edge, fast-growing FinTech company that's redefining the credit scoring industry. With the backing of major investors and a clear vision for the future, your work will make a real impact on financial inclusion worldwide. Join us and be a part of something truly transformative!
   

  

**APPOINTMENT OF ROLE**
 Q1/Q2 2026
   

  

**SCOPE**
 Full-time, permanent employment (tillsvidareanställning)
   

  

**SALARY**
 Competitive salary
   

  

**REPORTING**
 You will be reporting to the company’s VP Engineering
   

  

**WORKPLACE**
 Danderyd, Stockholm
   

  

**RECRUITMENT PROCESS**
 Ongoing selection, we review candidates continuously.
   

  

*Last day for applications 31st March 2026*
**CRIMINAL RECORDS EXTRACT**
 As part of our recruitment process we will ask you to present a clean criminal records extract
   

  

**CONTACT**
 Lorenzo Puccio, VP Strategic Operations, Lorenzo@kreditz.com
   

  

 For more information about the role feel free to reach out to our Co-founder/CTO, arlen@kreditz.com
   

  

 Intelligent credit- & risk decisions made easy with open banking & AI-technology

title: Platform Engineer
description:
Är du redo att forma framtidens IT tillsammans med några av branschens vassaste konsulter? Accelerate växer och vi söker fler Platform Engineers som vill vara med och bygga smarta, hållbara och säkra lösningar i teknikens absoluta framkant.
   

  

**Din roll**
 Som en del av vårt DevOps-team får du arbeta med marknadsledande kunder och hjälpa dem genom deras digitala transformation. Du jobbar långsiktigt i teamleveranser med modernisering, automation och agil utveckling, enligt vår metodik
 *Journey* 
 to Agile. Några av de tekniker/metoder som vi arbetar med är Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Jenkins, Ansible, Git, Bash, Python.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 Vi söker dig som har gedigen erfarenhet inom Plattform/DevOps och som brinner för automatisering och att bygga effektiva lösningar ute hos våra kunder. Du uttrycker dig obehindrat på svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift.
   

  

 För denna position krävs svenskt medborgarskap, vi utför även bakgrundskontroll av slutkandidat.
   

  

**Du Bör Ha Koll På**
* Linux i enterprise-miljöer
* Containerteknik: Docker, Kubernetes
* Script/programmering: Bash, Python, Go
* Versionshantering: Git
* Automatisering: Ansible, Terraform
* CI/CD och GitOps


**Extra Plus Om Du Även Har Koll På**
* OpenStack
* Public cloud
* OpenShift/Rancher
* HashiCorp Vault/Consul


**Vi erbjuder dig**
 Som anställd på Accelerate erbjuder vi förutom spännande uppdrag och tekniker:
   

  

* Utbildning & certifieringar via våra partners (Red Hat, Microsoft, HashiCorp, GitLab m.fl.)
* En trygg och säker anställning med bra förmåner
* Kollektivavtal, friskvårdsbidrag och sjukvårdsförsäkring
* Flexibilitet, frihet och balans mellan jobb och fritid
* Att bli en del i ett passionerat team med tekniskt vassa kollegor


 Vi tror på gemenskap och kompetensutbyte – här utvecklas vi tillsammans och stöttar varandra för att alltid ligga i framkant.
   

  

**Placeringsort**
 Accelerate finns på flertal orter i Sverige och Norge. För denna tjänst utgår du från vårt kontor i Stockholm, med möjlighet till hybridarbete.
   

  

 Önskad start är snarast eller enligt överenskommelse. Har du frågor? Kontakta Jesper Carlsson på jesper.carlsson@iver.se
   

  

**Vi ser fram emot att träffa dig. Välkommen till Accelerate!**

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
BizTalk DevOps Engineer
 



 Working Location: Stockholm, Sweden (Hybrid/Remote working)
 



 Contract Type
 



**Assignment Start:** 
 ASAP
 



**Assignment End:** 
 31st December 2026 (Possible Extension)
 



**Work Schedule:** 
 8 hours per day / 5 days a week
 



  





 Job Description
 



 A skilled BizTalk DevOps engineer is required for an international, collaborative DevOps team. For this role, extensive knowledge and experience in BizTalk is needed.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 


* Maintain integration solutions using BizTalk
* Develop build and release pipelines for BizTalk applications
* Handle incidents and perform root cause analysis for production systems
* Monitor BizTalk environments
* Perform platform upgrades and patches



  





 The team is an agile team, organized according to several competences. In total there are 12 DevOps engineers based in 4 different countries, forming an international environment. The atmosphere in the team is collaborative, with all team members working closely together every day.
 



  





 In this role, it is important that daily operations in BizTalk are supported. This includes monitoring the ticket system and production, as well as monitoring BizTalk environments.
 



  





 Requirements
 



 Mandatory Skills
 


* Proficiency in BizTalk Server administration
* Expertise with BT360
* ITIL-based ticketing system proficiency
* Hands-on experience with Azure DevOps pipelines, GIT, YAML and PowerShell
* Strong knowledge of Windows Server and Microsoft SQL Server
* Familiarity with Azure Dashboards and Application Insights
* Fluent English speaking and writing



  





 Nice to Have / Soft Skills
 


* Ability to analyze and resolve integration issues, ensuring smooth operation of the integration platform
* Strong communication and collaboration skills in an international team
* Swedish speaking and writing

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
**DevOps-konsult – Azure DevOps till GitHub Actions**
**Är du en erfaren DevOps-konsult med stark kompetens inom GitHub Actions och CI/CD?**
 Vi söker nu en konsult för ett längre uppdrag hos en aktör inom
 **Bank & Finans** 
 , med fokus på att driva och genomföra en omfattande modernisering av utvecklings- och deploymentsprocesser.
   

  

**Om uppdraget**
 Vår kund står inför en strategisk migrering från
 **Azure DevOps Server (TFS/on-prem)** 
 till
 **GitHub Enterprise och GitHub Actions** 
 . Uppdraget innebär att analysera befintliga lösningar, designa nya CI/CD-flöden och leda övergången till en modern, standardiserad plattform.
   

  

 Du kommer att arbeta i en komplex teknisk miljö med flera olika applikationstyper och ha en nyckelroll i att säkerställa en stabil och effektiv migrering.
   

  

**Ansvarsområden**
* Analysera befintliga build- och releasepipelines i Azure DevOps
* Designa och implementera GitHub Actions-workflows
* Migrera repositories, pipelines och deploymentsprocesser till GitHub
* Sätta upp environments, secrets och runner-strategier
* Säkerställa robusta bygg-, paketerings- och deploymentsflöden
* Bidra till standardisering och återanvändbara CI/CD-mallar
* Stötta utvecklingsteam under migrering och onboarding
* Fungera som teknisk ledare inom området och driva arbetet framåt


**Krav**
* Flera års erfarenhet av DevOps och CI/CD
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av GitHub Actions och GitHub Enterprise
* Gedigen erfarenhet av Azure DevOps/TFS
* Erfarenhet av .NET, C#, MSBuild och PowerShell
* Vana av Windows-baserade bygg- och deploymentsprocesser
* Stark förståelse för CI/CD-principer, automation och pipeline-design
* Förmåga att arbeta självständigt och driva tekniska initiativ


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av Kubernetes eller OpenShift
* Erfarenhet av IIS och Windows Server
* Erfarenhet av Artifactory eller motsvarande artefakthantering
* Erfarenhet av SonarQube
* Tidigare arbete inom större organisationer eller reglerade verksamheter, exempelvis bank- och finanssektorn


**Personliga egenskaper**
 Vi söker dig som är:
   

  

* Hands-on och lösningsorienterad
* Kommunikativ och prestigelös
* Van att arbeta nära utvecklingsteam och intressenter
* Strukturerad och noggrann i dokumentation och genomförande
* Trygg i att leda tekniska förändringsinitiativ


**Intresserad?**
 Skicka CV samt en kort beskrivning av relevanta uppdrag där du arbetat med
 **GitHub Actions** 
 ,
 **Azure DevOps-migreringar** 
 och CI/CD-modernisering.
   

  

 Vi presenterar kandidater löpande.

title: Forward Deployed Engineer
description:
Build something monumental for Healthcare!
   

  

 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 You love making things work. You're not in love with a specific solution or technology, but rather delivering value to users.
   

  

 At Tandem, Forward Deployed Engineers are the ones who bridge the gap between
 *the product demo* 
 and
 *real clinicians delivering better more efficient care* 
 . You’ll take on whatever stands in the way of our product’s real-world impact, debugging integrations, tweaking deployments, writing code to fill the gaps, and making sure everything runs smoothly in our customers’ environments. The learnings and abstractions you build along the way will set the foundation for the next generation of the product offering.
   

  

 Making things work for real is often messy & painful - but that’s what makes it fun! The prestige comes from happy customers not using the latest shiny dev tool.
   

  

 You’ll see firsthand how the tech you build actually changes how healthcare works, and you’ll become one of the people that truly understand both the technical and operational sides of what we do.
   

  

 This role is perfect for someone who’s obsessed with solving problems, who codes because they love it, and who cares more about
 *impact* 
 than tech stack. It’s a role for builders - people with founder energy, who want to learn fast, ship fast, and see their work make a difference immediately.
   

  

 If that sounds like you, we’d love to meet you.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Work with deploying, integrating, and optimizing our product in customer environments.
* Debug and solve complex, real-world problems across infrastructure, APIs, data flows, RPA, and configuration.
* Write clean, pragmatic code to adapt and extend our systems for each unique use case.
* Collaborate directly with clinicians, partners, and our internal teams to remove blockers and make deployments seamless.
* Shape the next generation of our product such that the next rollout delivers more value, more smoothly.
* Continuously identify, automate, and improve the painful parts of deployment so we can scale smarter next time.


**What You Bring**
* Deep love for programming and problem-solving.
* Curiosity that borders on obsession - you like understanding why things work (or don’t).
* A bias toward action - you’d rather get things done than talk about them.
* Comfort working in ambiguity and high velocity.
* A mindset that leans toward ownership, creativity, and future-founder energy.


 Bonus Points
   

  

* Experience integrating or deploying complex products in healthcare.
* Any other language skills than a fluency in English is a plus, especially German.
* Solid experience coding in Python, TypeScript, or C#.
* Experience with Robotic Process Automation (RPA) in the web or Windows context.


**Location**
 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of Stockholm where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.
   

  

**Our Interview Process Consists Of 4 Stages**
* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition
* Technical interviews with some of our Engineering team
* System Design Interview at our office - Join us in the Stockholm office for a lunch and a Product focused System Design interview to experience our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.
* Follow-up interview with our CTO & Co-Founder


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary & company stock options
* 30 days/year of paid vacation
* 5,000 SEK wellness allowance (friskvårdsbidrag) plus an additional 6,000 SEK yearly to spend on other health related initiatives
* Generous Parental leave top-up for new parents
* Private Medical Insurance to stay healthy
* Mental health support through our partner Mindler
* Pension program
* Social and team-building activities (off-sites, after works, winter/summer parties)
* An opportunity to make a real positive impact in the world of healthcare
* Work with some of the best minds in AI, healthcare, and engineering.


*We review our benefits packages on a regular basis and might modify our benefits from time to time.*
 Culture at Tandem
   

  

 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description:
**Build technology that protects people, places, and everyday life.**
 Your work won’t sit quietly in a backlog. It will shape secure, connected solutions used around the world — and you’ll have the trust and freedom to do your best work along the way.
   

  

**Why this role matters**
 At Assa Abloy, technology plays a direct role in creating a safer, more open world. As a
 **Senior Backend Engineer** 
 , you’ll be part of teams building secure, scalable digital platforms that power smart access solutions globally.
   

  

 This is a role for someone who wants to own meaningful problems, contribute to technical direction, and work in an environment where quality, balance, and long-term thinking genuinely matter.
   

  

**The role**
 You’ll work as part of a small, cross-functional team with shared end-to-end responsibility, collaborating closely to drive work from idea to delivery and continuous improvement. The team owns both the direction and execution, with a strong focus on improving our customers’ hospitality experience.
   

  

 In this role, you’re expected to take initiative and help move work forward, ensuring progress and alignment across disciplines. You’ll challenge assumptions, surface risks early, and contribute to sound technical decisions by bringing clarity, pragmatism and focus to complex discussions while helping the team deliver meaningful, high-quality outcomes.
   

  

**What You’ll Work On**
* Deliver meaningful features end-to-end — design, build, test, deploy, and evolve backend-focused services with a strong sense of ownership and quality.
* Build modern, scalable systems — develop primarily in Java, Kotlin, Golang, collaborating with frontend engineers and contributing where needed to React/TypeScript applications.
* Shape architecture and technical direction — apply Domain-Driven Design, Test-Driven Development, microservice and event-driven patterns to solve complex problems and raise the bar across the team.
* Lead cloud-native development — design and operate services on AWS, using containers, orchestration platforms, and serverless patterns to build resilient, future-proof solutions.
* Design data and system behaviour at scale — model data across NoSQL and relational systems, ensuring performance, reliability, and secure operation in distributed environments.
* Strengthen delivery and operational excellence — improve CI/CD pipelines, support production systems, and continuously refine engineering practices for long-term sustainability.


**What Will Help You Succeed**
* Solid senior experience (5+ years) building backend systems in cloud-native, distributed environments.
* Strong ownership mindset — you’re comfortable taking a feature from idea to production and standing behind your decisions.
* Architectural judgement — you know when and how to apply DDD, TDD, microservices, and event-driven design pragmatically.
* Hands-on cloud and DevOps experience — particularly with AWS , containerisation, CI/CD, and modern deployment models.
* Experience leveraging AI-assisted development tools and methods to enhance productivity, code quality, and system design.
* Clear, thoughtful communication and a willingness to mentor others .


**Why Assa Abloy**
 At Assa Abloy, you’ll join a global organisation with a distinctly
 **Scandinavian approach to work** 
 : trust over control, clarity over noise, and people over process.
   

  

* Meaningful mission — Your software helps protect homes, businesses, and communities around the world, contributing to solutions people rely on every day
* Innovation at scale — Work with modern cloud platforms, event-driven architectures, and evolving technologies in a global environment
* Autonomy and trust — You’re trusted to make decisions, influence design, and own your work from idea to impact
* Growth and development — Learn continuously, deepen your technical expertise, and explore opportunities across teams and borders
* Work–life balance — Flexible working, hybrid options, and a culture that supports sustainable performance


**Ready to build something that matters?**
 If you’re looking for a senior developer role where your skills, judgement, and wellbeing are genuinely valued, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

 Apply today and bring your expertise to a role where your decisions truly shape the future of smart access.
   

  

 We review applications continuously, so don’t wait.
   

  

 We’re committed to building diverse, inclusive teams and encourage applications from all who see themselves thriving here.
   

  

 To make sure your personal data stays protected, we do not review applications sent via email or post.
   

  

 If you have questions about the role or process, contact Léa Rein, Senior Talent Acquisition Business Partner.
   

  

**Let’s create a safer and more open world — together.**
**We are the ASSA ABLOY Group**
 Our people have made us the global leader in access solutions. In return, we open doors for them wherever they go. With nearly 63,000 colleagues in more than 70 different countries, we help billions of people experience a more open world. Our innovations make all sorts of spaces – physical and virtual – safer, more secure, and easier to access.
   

  

 As an employer, we value results – not titles, or backgrounds. We empower our people to build their career around their aspirations and our ambitions – supporting them with regular feedback, training, and development opportunities. Our colleagues think broadly about where they can make the most impact, and we encourage them to grow their role locally, regionally, or even internationally.
   

  

 As we welcome new people on board, it’s important to us to have diverse, inclusive teams, and we value different perspectives and experiences.

title: Unity/XR Developer Intern
description:
**XR Solutions** 
 is a technology based company that utilizes machine learning and powerful research-based optimizations to provide practical, reliable and optimizing augmented reality solutions to industrial companies.
 



  





 We believe that our
 **AR technology** 
 can change working methods, the way of thinking and enable new innovative solutions that previously was not achievable in industry and machine operation.
 



  





**Role Overview:** 




 We are seeking a passionate and dedicated
 **XR/Unity Developer Intern** 
 to join our team for an Internship. This is an exciting opportunity for someone looking to gain hands-on experience in working with
 **Augmented Reality** 
 within a fast-paced and supportive environment.
 



  





 As an
 **XR/Unity Developer Intern** 
 at
 **XR Solutions** 
 , you will work closely with our developers.
 



  





**What you’ll do:** 



* Design, build, and implement XR applications in Unity
* Develop interactive UI and features for AR environments
* Work with AR frameworks (e.g., ARKit)
* Collaborate with developers to bring features into production
* Conduct research on XR hardware (HMD) and technology solutions
* Contribute to product development and pilot deployments
* Test and iterate on XR features in real use cases



  





**What we’re looking for** 



* Strong experience with
 **Unity (AR/XR development)**
* Experience with
 **AR frameworks (e.g., ARKit)**
* Understanding of Augmented Reality principles



  





**What You’ll Gain and work with:** 



* Hands-on experience in
 **XR Development** 
 .
* Exposure to industry best practices in software development and
 **XR Space** 
 .
* Opportunity to work on real-world projects and contribute to innovative solutions.
* Valuable insights into working in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.
* Conduct research on technology solutions and Hardware for HMD.
* Designing, developing, and testing
 **Interactive UI in** 
**XR applications.**
* Solving market challenges together with the team with our groundbreaking product.
* Be part of our
 **Product Launch** 
 and the first Pilot Customer.



  





 If you’re excited about this opportunity and eager to learn, please send your resume outlining your interest in the position. We look forward to helping you grow your skills and advance your career in
 **XR Design & Development.** 




  





**This is a unpaid internship initially**

title: Senior Developer
description:
*Vi tror på ett samhälle format av framgångsrika företag där entreprenörskap och samhällsnytta går hand i hand. Att vara en del av Fortnox är att vara en del av en ständig förändring - en förändring där du själv bestämmer hur långt du vill nå. Vårt största fokus är att ge dig rätt förutsättningar att få leva din passion tillsammans med oss. Var du kommer ifrån är inte relevant - det är vart du är på väg som är intressant för oss. Precis som vi igår inte kunde drömma om det Fortnox som finns idag, så kan du vara med och forma vilka vi är imorgon.*
**Om tjänsten**
 I Stockholm förstärker vi nu upp våra team som utvecklar finansiella applikationer och funktioner. Vi utvecklar hela funktioner "från ax till limpa" vilket innebär databearbetning, dataanalys och algoritmutveckling samt utveckling av både back-end och front-end funktioner. Allt för att förädla och skapa lösningar som förändrar hur svenska företag hanterar sina finanser.
   

  

 Vi söker nu flera vassa utvecklare som vill kombinera “full stack”-utveckling med moderna språk och tekniker för att bygga system och funktioner som förenklar och förändrar den svenska finansmarknaden i grunden.
   

  

 Vi arbetar med bl.a.:
   

  

* Frontend: JavaScript/TypeScript, React
* Backend: Java, Kotlin
* Integrationer och data: REST-API:er, SQL-databaser, Kafka
* Övrigt: Microservices, AI/Machine Learning, GitHub/Bitbucket


**Vi söker dig som**
* Har ett genuint intresse för programmering i allmänhet och har mycket goda kunskaper i flertalet programmeringsspråk. Är civilingenjör inom datateknik, teknisk fysik eller liknande, alternativt har motsvarande examen inom relevant område. Har flera års erfarenhet av professionell mjukvaruutveckling
* Är driven och gillar att få saker gjort, brinner för att lära sig nya saker och vill jobba tillsammans med andra kompetenta utvecklare
* Praktisk erfarenhet av att använda AI-assisterade verktyg inom programvaruutveckling
* Är flytande i svenska i såväl tal som skrift


**Vad du får**
 På Fortnox bygger teamen sin egen teamkultur och ramverk. Teamen består av medlemmar med en hög kompetensnivå och som arbetar inom områden som är centrala inom Fortnoxs portfölj. Du kommer att ha möjlighet att utvecklas tekniskt genom att jobba tillsammans med dessa erfarna och kompetenta utvecklare samt ha stor möjlighet att påverka hur vi bygger och förädlar våra produkter.
   

  

 Fortnox tror på ett liv i balans och ”Fortnox MåBra” är ett koncept som finns för ditt välmående och återhämtning. Vidare tror vi också på flexibilitet och möjlighet att arbeta enligt en hybridmodell. Vi har ett attraktivt läge och utformning av vårt kontor på Linnégatan 89 i Stockholm.
   

  

**Fortnox - mitt i företagslivet**
*Fortnox hjälper företag att starta, växa och utvecklas. Med smarta tekniska lösningar för företag och redovisningsbyråer, smidig finansiering och ett ekosystem av starka partnerskap är Fortnox ett nav för företagande i Sverige. Vi drivs av visionen om ett välmående samhälle format av framgångsrika företag.*
*Fortnox grundades 2001 med huvudkontor i Växjö. Läs mer på www.fortnoxgroup.com.*
**Välkommen med din ansökan!**
**Behandling av personuppgifter**
 Vi på Fortnox värnar om din personliga integritet. När du skickar in din ansökan till oss kommer vi att behandla dina personuppgifter för att administrera rekryteringsprocessen. Personuppgiftsansvarig är det bolag som du söker arbete hos och är något bolag inom Fortnoxkoncernen. Du kan läsa integritetsmeddelandet i sin helhet på följande länk:
   

  

 https://apps.fortnox.se/api/eula/document-v1/privacy-policy-recruiting

title: Implema & Friends
description:
Är du giggare? Bli en Implema Friend.
   

  

 Tillsammans är alltid starkare. Vi anlitar gärna dig som har senior kompetens. För vi vet att det blir bra när våra konsulter, underkonsulter och kunder samarbetar.
   

  

 För dig som är underkonsult finns det goda möjligheter till olika uppdrag inom spännande projekt hos oss. Vi har starka relationer till våra underkonsulter och vill nu växa vårt nätverk.
   

  

 Skicka gärna in din intresseanmälan så tar vi kontakt med dig när det dyker upp en möjlighet som matchar din profil!
   

  

**Välkommen att bli en del av Implema & Friends!**
 Implema är en av Sveriges ledande specialister på att snabbt implementera affärssystem baserat på marknadens ledande affärssystem SAP och Microsoft Dynamics. Med mer än 20 års erfarenhet av affärskritiska projekt guidar Implema svenska och internationella företag till effektiva och hållbara affärsprocesser och den snabbaste vägen till framtidens affärssystem. Vi vill finnas nära våra kunder och har kontor på 10 orter runt om i Sverige och omsätter 500 MSEK. Vi växer och vill bli fler!

title: Senior Data Engineer, Microsoft Fabric - Tieto Tech Consulting (m/f/d)
description:
Jobbeskrivning
   

  

**Senior Data Engineer – Microsoft Fabric (Stockholm / Hybrid)**
 Vill du vara med och bygga nästa generations dataplattformar i Microsoft Fabric?
   

  

 Vi söker en erfaren Data Engineer som vill ta en ledande roll i att designa, utveckla och migrera moderna datalösningar i molnet.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som Senior Data Engineer arbetar du nära både verksamhet och teknikteam för att skapa robusta och skalbara dataplattformar i Microsoft Fabric. Rollen innebär ett stort fokus på implementation – du har gjort detta förut och trivs med att driva arbetet framåt i verkliga projekt.
   

  

**Du Kommer i Hög Grad Arbeta Med**
* Design och implementering av lösningar i Microsoft Fabric
* Migrering från äldre dataplattformar (t.ex. SQL Server, SSIS, on-prem DWH, Azure Synapse, etc.)
* Bygga moderna data pipelines och lakehouse-arkitektur
* Datamodellering och optimering för analys och BI (Power BI)


**Vi Söker Dig Som Har**
* Minst 5–8 års erfarenhet som Data Engineer eller motsvarande roll
* Praktisk, hands-on erfarenhet av Microsoft Fabric i projekt
* Erfarenhet av att migrera dataplattformar till moderna molnlösningar
* Tidigare arbete med Azure-baserade datatjänster


**Tekniska kompetenser**
**Microsoft Fabric & data stack**
* Microsoft Fabric (Data Factory, Synapse / Data Engineering, Real-Time Analytics)
* Lakehouse-arkitektur och Delta Lake
* Data pipelines och orkestrering


**Azure & dataplattform**
* Azure Data Factory
* Azure Synapse Analytics (eller liknande)
* Azure Data Lake Storage
* Databricks (meriterande)


**Backend & data processing**
* SQL (avancerad nivå)
* Python / PySpark
* Datamodellering (Kimball, dimensional modeling)


**BI & konsumtion**
* Power BI (integration, modellering, optimering)


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av större transformations- eller migreringsprojekt
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD för datapipelines
* DevOps (Azure DevOps / Git)
* Streaming och realtidsdata
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i konsult- eller kundnära miljö


**Personliga egenskaper**
* Självständig och lösningsorienterad
* Kommunikativ – kan översätta teknik till verksamhetsnytta
* Driv att ta saker i mål
* Trivs i föränderliga miljöer


 Låter det intressant?
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan! Bifoga ditt CV eller din LinkedIn-profil så kontaktar vi dig. Intervjuer kommer att hållas löpande, så vi uppmuntrar dig att ansöka redan idag! Om du har ytterligare frågor om rollen är du varmt välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef Mariko Eldenholt, mariko.eldenholt@tieto.com
   

  

*Vi utför bakgrundskontroller av alla slutkandidater.*
*Tieto avböjer samtal från rekryteringsföretag.*
**Om Tieto**
 Tieto skapar meningsfull teknologi som bidrar till att göra världen bättre. Vi är ett ledande techbolag med lång historia och närvaro i Norden men har också global kapacitet. Baserat på våra kärnvärden öppenhet, trovärdighet och mångfald, jobbar vi tillsammans med våra kunder – och utvecklar en digital framtid där företag, samhällen och människor kan växa.
   

  

 Våra 24 000 experter globalt specialiserar sig på cloud, data och mjukvara för tusentals företag och organisationer inom privat och offentlig sektor i mer än 90 länder. Tieto omsätter årligen cirka 3 miljarder euro och företagets aktier är noterade på NASDAQ-börsen i Helsingfors och Stockholm samt på Oslo Børs.
   

  

 Ytterligare information
   

  

 At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.
   

  

 Diversity, equity and inclusion | Sustainability | Tieto
   

  

**Stay Alert To Recruitment Scams**
* Tieto only communicates via @tieto.com email addresses.
* We never ask candidates to pay fees or share financial details during recruitment.
* If you receive a suspicious message claiming to be from Tieto, don't respond — verify it via our official careers site.
* For more information visit Important Advisory Regarding Recruitment Fraud | Tieto Blog

title: Legal Counsel Digital, AI and Cyber Law, Robotics
description:
At ABB, we help industries outrun - leaner and cleaner. Here, progress is an expectation - for you, your team, and the world. As a global market leader, we’ll give you what you need to make it happen. It won’t always be easy, growing takes grit. But at ABB, you’ll never run alone. Run what runs the world.


This role sits within ABB's Robotics business, a leading global robotics company. We're entering an exciting new chapter as we’ve announced the plan for SoftBank Group to acquire ABB Robotics. SoftBank is a globally recognized technology group and investor/operator focused on AI, robotics, and next-generation computing. By joining us now, you’ll be part of a pioneering team shaping the future of robotics—working alongside world-class experts in a fast-moving, innovation-driven environment.


This Position reports to:


Global Head of IP and Digital, Robotics  

As **Lead Counsel Digital, AI, & Cyber Law**, you will play a pivotal role in supporting the company’s digital business and transformation initiatives reporting directly to the Head of IP. You will partner with business leaders, technology teams, and group functions to provide practical legal and compliance guidance, ensuring that innovation and growth in digital solutions are underpinned by sound legal frameworks and integrity standards.  

  

The work model for the role is: hybrid #LI-hybrid  

The location for the role is flexible in Europe and US.

 **Your responsibilities:**

* Provide legal advice and support on digital business initiatives, including AI, cloud services, datacentre, software, licensing, and technology-driven solutions.
* Responsible for guiding the company’s digital strategy, leveraging AI and emerging technologies.
* Draft, review, and negotiate a wide range of digital and technology-related agreements with global customers, partners, and suppliers.
* Support digital transformation projects, ensuring compliance with applicable laws, regulations, and internal policies.
* Advise on intellectual property, cybersecurity, and related regulatory issues impacting digital business.
* Collaborate with global and local Legal & Integrity colleagues to ensure consistency of approach across jurisdictions.
* Monitor legal and regulatory trends in digital and technology markets, proactively identifying risks and opportunities.
* Protect the company’s reputation by ensuring operations meet ethical and compliance standards.
* Provide training and guidance to business stakeholders on legal issues relevant to digital offerings.
 **Your qualifications:**

* Qualified lawyer with 10–15 years of experience in commercial/technology law, preferably gained in a multinational corporate or top-tier law firm environment.
* Strong expertise in digital, AI, IT, cyber law, software licensing, cloud, data centre, and data protection law.
* Previous experience in Robotics sector is preferred but not required.
* Proven track record in negotiating complex technology agreements across international markets.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills, able to engage effectively with senior business stakeholders.
* Pragmatic, solution-oriented, and commercially minded, with the ability to balance innovation and risk.
* Fluency in English required; additional European languages are a strong asset.

We value people from different backgrounds. Could this be your story? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to read more about us and learn about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

title: Surveillance Specialist Data Centric Architecture ﻿
description:
*Want to influence the bigger picture? At Saab, you can realise amazing innovations that keep people and societies safe. Together, we can truly make an impact – and your part matters.*

### **Your role**


Armed forces are rapidly moving towards data‑driven, multi‑domain operations. To enable this, Saab needs to build solutions that are **data centric by design** – where data can be shared, discovered and exploited securely across systems, domains and nations.


Guided by emerging reference architectures such as NATO’s Data Centric Reference Architecture for the Alliance (DCRA), the Alliance Data Sharing Ecosystem (ADSE) and the NATO Digital Backbone, we are now looking for a **Specialist within the area of Data Centric Architecture**.


Your role as a specialist at Business Unit Digital Battlespace Solutions (DBS) will be to act as the link between **data‑centric reference architectures, standards and governance models** on one side, and Saabs technical solutions, platforms and products on the other.


The overall responsibilities will be to:

* Uphold and share knowledge about data‑centric reference architectures (e.g. NATO DCRA, Digital Backbone Reference Architecture, Zero Trust Reference Architecture)
* Support and advise architectural work regarding data‑centric design (e.g. data mesh, data spaces, data‑as‑a‑product, federated data catalogues)
* Be a natural hub for data‑centric architecture and interoperability networks, both internally and in relevant international forums
* Contribute to the definition of Saab‑wide data architecture principles, patterns and building blocks (e.g. data domains, semantic models, APIs, catalogues, governance services)
* Support programmes and product teams in applying data‑centric principles in concrete solution architectures and roadmaps
* Write documentation and guidelines as well as participate in technical discussions and reviews regarding solutions


The main purpose of the Surveillance Specialist Program is to strengthen technical leadership and to ensure the right competence for our future business. The role of the Specialist is to drive the development within a certain technical area, creating interest and helping to push technical boundaries and Saab’s position as innovation leader. This is performed by monitoring technical progress and creating Saab awareness to help grasp opportunities and reduce risks.


External and international relations are essential to develop competence and identify opportunities. This includes relations with academia, partners as well as customers and international standardisation bodies.


Although a specialist belongs to a designated line organization, it is important to note that being a specialist means working for Saab as a whole. After the recruitment process, specialists are appointed for a period of two to three years and at 15 to 20% equivalent of a full-time position.


The position is allocated to our operations in Solna.

### **Your profile**


We are looking for an experienced **System Architect, Enterprise/Information Architect, Senior System Engineer or Technical/Product Manager** with a strong interest in data‑centric design. You have the ability to both see the big picture and understand the details where necessary.


You are a good communicator with the ability to create trust and commitment among our teams, customers and project stakeholders. You strive to identify new possibilities, challenges and ways to be more efficient – and you act on them.


We seek you with knowledge in one or more of the following areas:

* Design and implementation of data‑intensive systems or platforms (e.g. C2, ISR, mission systems, analytics/AI platforms)
* Data‑centric architectural patterns, such as data mesh, data spaces, data‑as‑a‑product, federated data catalogues
* Data governance, master and reference data management, data quality frameworks and data‑centric security/Zero Trust
* Semantic modelling and standardisation (e.g. vocabularies, ontologies, MIM, CXCSRM NATO Core Data Framework, metadata standards such as ADatP‑4774/4778/5636)
* API‑driven architectures and model‑driven approaches (MDA) for interoperability‑by‑design
* Experience from applying or aligning to reference architectures in a defence or critical‑infrastructure context (e.g. NATO DCRA, Digital Backbone RA, Zero Trust RA, FMN Spiral Specifications)


Meriting experience:

* Architecture work in multinational or joint programmes where data sharing and sovereignty are key concerns
* Work with cloud, hybrid and edge‑based data platforms and storage architectures
* Experience from data analytics/AI/ML solutions and their data requirements


For this position, it is essential to be able to communicate fluently in Swedish, both verbally and in writing.


This position requires that you pass a security vetting based on the current regulations around/of security protection. For positions requiring security clearance additional obligations on citizenship may apply.

### **What you will be a part of**


Explore a wealth of possibilities. Take on challenges, create smart inventions, and grow beyond. This is a place for curious minds, brave pioneers, and everyone in between. Together, we achieve the extraordinary, each bringing our unique perspectives. Your part matters.


Saab is a leading defence and security company with an enduring mission, to help nations keep their people and society safe. Empowered by its 26,100 talented people, Saab constantly pushes the boundaries of technology to create a safer and more sustainable world.


Saab designs, manufactures and maintains advanced systems in aeronautics, weapons, command and control, sensors and underwater systems. Saab is headquartered in Sweden. It has major operations all over the world and is part of the domestic defence capability of several nations. Read more about us here


You will be a part of Business Unit Digital Battlespace Solutions (DBS), which supplies world‑leading Command and Control systems and digital solutions for the battlespace.


Kindly observe that this is an ongoing recruitment process and that the position might be filled before the closing date of the advertisement.

title: Junior Incident Response Engineer
description:
Sectra One Cloud serves the world's largest diagnostic imaging providers. When incidents happen at scale, you'll investigate the complex technical failures that matter. You'll develop deep expertise in our products, cloud infrastructure, and systems, turning incident patterns into proactive engineering that prevents entire categories of failures.
  
  

This is your chance to master technical reliability on a mission-critical healthcare platform at a pivotal growth stage. You'll work alongside experienced troubleshooters who live and breathe incident investigation.
  
  

About the Role
  
  

**Location:** Linköping, Sweden
  
  

You'll join the Response Team, a core of experienced engineers who drive advanced incident response and technical depth. The work centers on investigation and pattern recognition: understanding how our systems behave under stress, recognizing failure modes, and identifying systemic improvements.
  
  

As a junior engineer, you'll start with structured incident investigations, learning from senior engineers how to trace architectures and identify root causes. You'll grow into identifying patterns in our incidents and proposing improvements. Within your first year, you'll move toward leading reliability initiatives, from defining technical standards to optimizing our systems for observability.
  
  

This role demands curiosity. You'll dig into failures because you genuinely want to understand them. You don't stop at fixing symptoms; you find the architectural change that prevents the problem from happening again.
  
  

You'll work hands-on with our products and services, improving tools and best practices. You'll collaborate across our global organization and with development teams, learning not just how systems work, but why reliability matters in healthcare.
  
  

Key Responsibilities
  
  

Investigate incidents (starting point)
  
  

Conduct technical investigations of incidents under guidance from experienced engineers
  
Learn to trace system architectures, analyze anomalies, and identify root causes
  
  

Recognize patterns and propose improvements (growth over months)
  
  

Analyze what incidents reveal about systemic weaknesses
  
Identify recurring failure patterns alongside senior engineers
  
Help develop playbooks and tools; contribute to product improvement proposals
  
  

Drive reliability improvements (as you develop expertise)
  
  

Establish best practices for how services should be architected and deployed
  
Guide product teams on technical decisions affecting operational stability
  
  

Enhance our observability
  
  

Contribute to improvements in monitoring and tracing
  
Use incident investigations to identify gaps in visibility
  
Skills & Requirements
  
  

At Sectra, we hire for attitude and ability – train for skill. This means who you are is more important than your previous experiences. There are a few core abilities that are central for any role. We always look for your willingness and ability to learn and take on new tasks fast, utilize previous experiences and quickly grasp new information. We also want you to have a strong analytical mindset in which we consider it to be important that you can understand and break down and solve problems. We also look for good communicators who have the ability to interact with colleagues, partners and customers in an effective, clear and constructive way.
  
  

**You bring:**  

Strong computer science fundamentals (data structures, algorithms, networking, software architecture)
  
Genuine curiosity about system behavior, you dig into anomalies because you want to understand them fully
  
Passion for turning reactive incidents into proactive improvements
  
Strong communication and collaboration skills; comfort working across global teams
  
Curiosity and learning agility; ability to adapt to new domains and tools
  
  

**Nice to have:**  

Interest in performance engineering and optimization at scale
  
Background in medical imaging, healthcare IT, or healthcare systems (DICOM, HL7/FHIR, imaging pipelines)
  
Experience with Windows, MS SQL Server, cloud infrastructure (Azure/VMware), Active Directory, scripting
  
**Database knowledge:** scaling, replication, failure modes, optimization
  
**Network troubleshooting:** TCP/IP, DNS, load balancing, security
  
  

Why Join Us?
  
  

**Learn from the best:** Your team includes experts in large-scale systems and incident response
  
**Own impact:** Your improvements directly improve reliability for healthcare providers worldwide
  
**Grow fast:** Within your first year, you'll move from learning investigations to leading reliability initiatives
  
**Solve real problems:** Work on challenges that matter in healthcare, not toy projects
  
  

**Other information:**  

The goal is for the right candidate to start as soon as possible.
  
  

We recruit on an ongoing basis. This means we encourage you to apply or contact us as soon as possible.
  
  

Depending on the role, a mandatory background security screening might be performed as part of the recruitment process at Sectra. Please reach out to the responsible hiring team if you have any questions regarding this.
  
  

Great Place to Work
  
  

Making a difference
  
  

Great colleagues
  
  

Personal development
  
  

Innovation & technology
  
  

Global environment
  
  

Working close to customers
  
  

About the company
  
  

Sectra develops and sells cutting-edge solutions for medical IT and cybersecurity. We help hospitals and those who are training future healthcare personnel to improve their efficiency so that patients can receive better care. We also support and help defense, authorities, and critical social functions to secure their communication against eavesdropping and protect their systems against unauthorized access. This is how we create conditions for a healthier and safer society.
  
  

One thing that identifies us at Sectra is our customer obsession— our ability and willingness to understand, create value for and stand up for our customers. This shared priority is at the core of our culture. Our customers describe this as having the knowledge to meet expectations, the passion to exceed them. As we hire for attitude and ability - train for skill, we happily expand your knowledge, if you bring the passion and willingness to learn.

title: Staff AI Product Analyst, Product Management | Sweden | Remote
description:
Grafana Labs, the company behind the open observability cloud, is founded on the principles of open source, open standards, open ecosystems, and open culture. Grafana Cloud, our fully managed observability platform, is flexible and built for scale. With Grafana Cloud's actually useful AI, organizations can see, understand, and act on all their disparate data to move at the speed of their ambitions. Today, more than 35 million users and 7,000+ customers – including Anthropic, Bloomberg, NVIDIA, Microsoft, and Salesforce – trust Grafana Labs to ensure reliability of their applications and systems, resolve incidents quickly, and optimize their telemetry to reduce noise and cost. We are a 100% remote company with 1,600+ team members across 40+ countries, and we’re backed by leading investors including Lightspeed Venture Partners, Sequoia Capital, GIC, Coatue, J.P. Morgan, CapitalG, and Lead Edge Capital. Learn more at grafana.com and follow us on LinkedIn and X.



We’re scaling fast and staying true to what makes us different: an open-source legacy, a global collaborative culture, and a passion for meaningful work. Our team thrives in an innovation-driven environment where transparency, autonomy, and trust fuel everything we do.



You may not meet every requirement, and that’s okay. If this role excites you, we’d love you to raise your hand for what could be a truly career-defining opportunity.

**This is a remote position. We are looking for candidates in the UK, Germany, Sweden or Spain.**


### **About the Role**



We’re looking for a **Staff Product Analyst** to join our growing Product Analytics team and serve as a strategic partner to Grafana’s **AI organization**. This role will support the teams building **Grafana Assistant**, our synchronous chat experience; **Investigations**, our asynchronous AI workflow for incident analysis; and **AI observability solutions**, including **Sigil**.



You will shape how the AI team measures success by defining KPIs, improving measurement practices, guiding experiment design and evaluation, and translating data into recommendations that influence product decisions.



This is a highly cross-functional role. You’ll work closely with Product, Design, Engineering, and Data partners, with a primary focus on supporting the AI team, and report to the Product Analytics Manager



If you’re excited about building strong product analytics capabilities and using data to shape the future of **AI-powered experiences at Grafana**, we’d love to hear from you.


**You Will**


* Partner cross functionally across Product to establish top-level KPIs, dashboards, and product roadmap planning
* Define how success is measured for AI-powered product experiences, including adoption, engagement, quality, retention, and user outcomes
* Guide the instrumentation of product data in collaboration with our Product Design, Product Management, and Engineering teams to enable reliable analysis of AI features and workflows.
* Design, evaluate, and interpret experiments to assess the impact of new AI capabilities and inform product decisions.
* Develop dbt models to transform and test our user behavior data in partnership with our Analytics Engineering team
* Influence best practices for Product Analytics across teams and help define standards as the company scales
* Contribute to defining the long-term vision and strategy for Product Analytics, balancing near-term needs with scalable, durable solutions.


**You have**


* Experience partnering across product and engineering organizations, and familiarity with typical product KPIs and frameworks (e.g., DAU/MAU, funnels, A/B testing)
* Experience defining and tracking success metrics for complex product areas, ideally including AI-powered features or workflows.
* SQL: writing complex yet efficient SQL is a daily habit for you
* Data Visualization: experience with any of the following tools: Tableau, Looker, Omni, Hex, or of course, Grafana!
* Experience writing dbt models, implementing Product Analytics tooling (e.g., Heap, Pendo, Amplitude, FullStory), and code version control (git)
* Experience using AI-assisted coding tools (e.g., Cursor, Claude Code) to quickly prototype and iterate across analysis, data modeling, instrumentation, visualization and code development.
* Excellent communication skills, able to explain technical topics to non-technical audiences, and maintain many of the essential cross-team and cross-functional relationships necessary for the team’s success


**A plus if you have**


* Knowledge about observability
* Familiarity with Airflow or Prefect - generating ad hoc ETL jobs


In Sweden, the Base compensation range for this role is SEK 775,444 - 930,533. Actual compensation may vary based on level, experience, and skillset as assessed in the interview process. Benefits include equity, bonus (if applicable) and other benefits listed here.


* *Compensation ranges are country specific. If you are applying for this role from a different location than listed above, your recruiter will discuss your specific market’s defined pay range & benefits at the beginning of the process.*

* *Compensation ranges are country specific. If you are applying for this role from a different location than listed above, your recruiter will discuss your specific market’s defined pay range & benefits at the beginning of the process.*


**Why You’ll Thrive at Grafana Labs:**


* **100% Remote, Global Culture -** As a remote-only company, we bring together talent from around the world, united by a culture of collaboration and shared purpose.
* **Scaling Organization** – Tackle meaningful work in a high-growth, ever-evolving environment.
* **Transparent Communication** – Expect open decision-making and regular company-wide updates.
* **Innovation-Driven** – Autonomy and support to ship great work and try new things.
* **Open Source Roots** – Built on community-driven values that shape how we work.
* **Empowered Teams** – High trust, low ego culture that values outcomes over optics.
* **Career Growth Pathways** – Defined opportunities to grow and develop your career.
* **Approachable Leadership** – Transparent execs who are involved, visible, and human.
* **Passionate People** – Join a team of smart, supportive folks who care deeply about what they do.
* **In-Person onboarding** - We want you to thrive from day 1 with your fellow new ‘Grafanistas’ to learn all about what we do and how we do it.
* **Balance is Key** - We operate a global annual leave policy of 30 days per annum. 3 days of your annual leave entitlement are reserved for Grafana Shutdown Days to allow the team to really disconnect. *\*We will comply with local legislation where applicable.*


**Equal Opportunity Employer:** *Grafana Labs is an equal opportunities employer. We welcome applications from everyone regardless of race, colour, nationality, origin, caste, sex, gender reassignment identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, religion or belief, disability, veteran status, genetic information, pregnancy, maternity, marital, family or carer status, or any other characteristic which is protected by local law. We believe that equality and diversity build a strong organisation, and we work hard to ensure that is the foundation of our organisation as we grow.*


*Grafana Labs may utilize AI tools in its recruitment process to assist in matching information provided in CVs to job postings. The recruitment team will continue to review inbound CVs manually to identify alignment with current openings.*



#LI-Remote



*For information about how your personal data is used once you’ve applied to a job, check out our* *privacy policy**.*
